narrative_beat: Wide de relogio gigante dourado com ponteiro a 85 segundos da meia-noite, pulsando vermelho, fundo cogumelo atomico P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive classical wall clock with aged gold Roman numerals, ornate bronze frame, hands positioned 85 seconds before midnight
subject.focal_point: the minute hand glowing pulsing crimson-red just before the XII
subject.secondary: aged patina on bronze, scratched glass dome reflecting faint light, ticking second hand blur

environment.location: dark void space with distant background horizon

composition.rule: centered symmetric, clock fills 70% of frame
composition.foreground: ornate gold clock face with crimson pulsing hand
composition.midground: floating ash and embers in amber tones
composition.background: desaturated grayscale mushroom cloud rising on distant horizon

lighting.key_light: warm amber frontal light on clock face
lighting.fill_light: cool blue ambient on background mushroom cloud
lighting.rim_light: crimson rim on clock hand and edges
lighting.shadow_quality: deep shadows in clock carvings, sharp contrast

style.post_processing: halation on crimson hand, crushed blacks on background, heavy grain, amber warmth on foreground only
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, bronze patina, scratched glass, dust particles in air

symbolism.primary: Doomsday Clock as secular parallel to apocalyptic prophecy

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks except Roman numerals on clock
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

text_elements: Roman numerals I-XII on clock face (aged gold)

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: O Relogio do Juizo Final esta em oitenta e cinco segundos para a meia-noite.
